## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Mara Leighton as a new director at growthx.ai and discuss company growth, challenges, and strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai is experiencing rapid growth, hiring 20+ people in 3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Key challenges: onboarding/training, proving ROI, and developing customer success strategies](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Company structure: directors (like Mara) lead pods/teams with mixed editorial, SEO, and growth expertise](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Plans for external community (ailedgrowth.com) and publication to attract talent and clients](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)

## Topics

### Rapid Company Growth and Challenges

  - [Hired 20+ people in 3 weeks, creating multiple layers of new employees](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Challenge: bringing everyone up to speed on context, knowledge, and "growthx way"](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Difficulty in planning kickoffs due to multiple contracts out simultaneously](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [Focus on hiring shifted to onboarding, training, and enablement](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)

### Team Structure and Expertise

  - [Directors lead pods/teams with mixed skills (editorial, SEO, growth)](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Hiring production assistants for CMS work and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Goal: Directors to bring up team leads to perform at high levels](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [Example of success: Ada (managing editor) turning client relationships from "red to green" within a week](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Customer Success and ROI

  - [Board emphasized importance of proving ROI and customer success strategy](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Exploring customer success platforms (e.g., Gainesite) for managing client happiness and retention](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Balancing client education on content creation process with interpersonal skills](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)

### Knowledge Sharing and Training

  - [Exploring ways to share individual expertise (e.g., Dave's SEO knowledge)](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Considering creation of external resources that can serve as internal training](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
  - [Using Circle platform for some training materials, but still developing approach](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)

### External Community and Publication Plans

  - [Purchased ailedgrowth.com domain for community and publication](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Idea for "blank cursor" newsletter concept](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [Goal: Create external resource for learning, attracting clients, and identifying potential hires](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)

### Client Management and Communication

  - [Importance of "humble brags" and mentioning team's expertise during client interactions](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [Exploring various methods to ensure client satisfaction (QBRs, MBRs, surveys, one-on-ones)](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
  - [Balancing different content types to appeal to various stakeholders within client companies](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create a dedicated Slack channel for onboarding questions and knowledge sharing](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Mara to complete onboarding checklist and review available resources](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [Explore opportunities for growthx.ai to be its own "client zero" for testing services and creating content](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
  - [Consider developing case studies and more concrete ROI metrics for client success stories](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Investigate ways to incorporate more design elements into deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Continue to refine onboarding and training processes as the company scales](https://fathom.video/share/LCz_qNzeMdRpqVaxiSPm4P6dku94r_sw?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
